extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked on final climb to Prati di Tivo, dropped all rivals solo to take stage by 6 seconds over YATES who caught on late.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS attacked early on final climb forcing POGAČAR to chase, revealing UAE strategy allows rivals to test him first.
YATES launched late counterattack after being distanced, gaining more time than those who followed POGAČAR's initial acceleration.
ALMEIDA and LANDA chased separately rather than cooperating, allowing POGAČAR's gap to grow through disorganized pursuit.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: admitted struggling to finish alone, suggesting margin over rivals narrower than final 6-second gap implies
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: probed POGAČAR first on final climb despite being outside GC contention, showing form recovery
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: late attack limited losses to 6 seconds after being dropped, better pacing than midpack chasers
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: finished in top ten over 40 seconds back, showing climber's stage beyond all-rounder capabilities
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: chased individually rather than organizing group, tactical naivety cost 30+ seconds to YATES
